abstract: A Boolean value that indicates whether the person needs approval to install the app.
overview:
## Discussion

Set this property to `true` if the app to install has an age rating beyond the maximum allowed for the device (see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/maximumAllowedAgeRating]). Instead of installing the app, the framework presents a sheet that enables the person to send an installation exception request to the parent or guardian. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/marketplacekit/providing-age-rating-appropriate-content].

If your app sets this property to `true` when it’s not needed, the framework throws [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/MarketplaceKitError/ageRatingExceptionNotNeeded]. Alternatively, if your app fails to set this property to `true` when it is needed, the framework throws  [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/MarketplaceKitError/cancelled].

# requestAgeException

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the person needs approval to install the app.

## Declaration

```swift
var requestAgeException: Bool
```

## Discussion

Set this property to `true` if the app to install has an age rating beyond the maximum allowed for the device (see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/AppLibrary/maximumAllowedAgeRating]). Instead of installing the app, the framework presents a sheet that enables the person to send an installation exception request to the parent or guardian. For more information, see [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/marketplacekit/providing-age-rating-appropriate-content].

If your app sets this property to `true` when it’s not needed, the framework throws [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/MarketplaceKitError/ageRatingExceptionNotNeeded]. Alternatively, if your app fails to set this property to `true` when it is needed, the framework throws  [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/MarketplaceKitError/cancelled].
title: requestAgeException
